TYPES.FPCLINE: tt_lips TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_lips.
ttl_pack TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_pack.
tt_konv TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_konv.
tt_total TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_total.
tt_likp TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_likp.
tt_gs TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_mytype.
tt_tax TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_tax.
TYPES: zline TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_text,

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: * set textnames for header, adress and footer
*clear : ls_line, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z007' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = DATA(LV_LINES1) ).
*clear : ls_line,LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z008' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
*clear : ls_line, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z006' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
*clear : ls_line , LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z010' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
*clear : LS_LINE, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* DELETE LT_LINES WHERE tdline is INITIAL.
***** CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
***** wa_zline-txt = LS_LINE-TDLINE ."INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
**** "CONCATENATE LV_notify LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_notify SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
**** CONCATENATE LV_notify LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_notify SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
** CONCATENATE LV_notify LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_notify SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z040' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
*clear : ls_line , LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z033' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
* CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
FROM VBRP INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF @LW_VBRP
DELETE IT_KONV WHERE KWERT IS INITIAL .
DELETE GT_TOTAL WHERE SRNO IS INITIAL.
* GW_TAX-DIS = 'Sub Total' . "commented by mahadev sandip on 04/12/2025
* GW_TAX-DIS = 'Grand Total' . "commented by mahadev sandip on 04/12/2025
*SELECT SUM( kbetr ) FROM konv INTO lv_fright
*SELECT SINGLE kschl FROM konv INTO lv_kschl
*SELECT SINGLE vtext FROM t685t INTO gv_ftxt
SELECT SINGLE WERKS MATNR ARKTX FKIMG
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO GS_PL_ADRC
SELECT SINGLE LANDX FROM T005T INTO GV_PL_LANDX
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T005U INTO GS_PL_T005U
SELECT SINGLE J_1IEXCD FROM J_1IMOCOMP INTO GV_J_1IEXCD
SELECT SINGLE * FROM LIKP INTO GS_LIKP
VERUR FROM LIKP INTO TABLE IT_LIKP
READ TABLE IT_LIKP INTO WA_LIKP INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE LANDX FROM T005T INTO G_LANDX2
FROM VBPA INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_VBPA
* Ship to party address from Sales order header
SELECT SINGLE ADRNR FROM VBPA INTO L_ADRNR
SELECT SINGLE KUNNR FROM VBPA INTO @DATA(WA_VBPA1)
SELECT SINGLE ADRNR FROM KNA1 INTO @DATA(WA_KNA1)
SELECT SINGLE NAME_CO,STR_SUPPL1,STREET FROM ADRC INTO @DATA(WA_ADRC1)
SELECT SINGLE * FROM ADRC INTO GS_KU_ADRC
CONCATENATE 'District:' GS_KU_ADRC-CITY2 INTO CITY2 SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE 'Tel:' GS_KU_ADRC-TEL_NUMBER INTO TELNO SEPARATED BY SPACE.
CONCATENATE 'Fax:' GS_KU_ADRC-FAX_NUMBER INTO FAXNO SEPARATED BY SPACE.
SELECT SINGLE * FROM T005U INTO GS_KU_T005U
SELECT SINGLE LANDX FROM T005T INTO GV_KU_LANDX
LS_ADR-LINE = GS_KU_ADRC-NAME2. "Added By Nilay B. on 18.01.2024
SELECT SINGLE VSART FROM VBKD INTO
SELECT SINGLE BEZEI FROM T173T INTO GV_BEZEI
SELECT SINGLE VSTEL FROM VBAP INTO
SELECT SINGLE ALAND FROM TVST INTO L_ALAND
SELECT SINGLE LANDX FROM T005T INTO G_LANDX1
SELECT VBELN POSNR MATNR MATKL ARKTX
FROM LIPS INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_LIPS
SELECT SINGLE TEXT1 FROM T052U INTO G_TEXT2 WHERE ZTERM = G_TERM AND SPRAS = 'EN'.
READ TABLE IT_LIPS INTO WA_LIPS INDEX 1.
SELECT SINGLE VTEXT FROM TVZBT INTO
SELECT SINGLE TEXT1 FROM T052U INTO G_TEXT2 WHERE ZTERM = G_TERM AND SPRAS = 'EN'.
SELECT SINGLE WAERK INCO1 INCO2 KURRF FROM VBRK INTO
(G_WAERK, G_INCO1, G_INCO2, G_KURRF) WHERE VBELN = IS_BIL_INVOICE-HD_GEN-BIL_NUMBER.
SELECT SINGLE INCO2 FROM VBKD INTO G_INCO2
CLEAR : WA_MARA, TG_AMT, GV_AMT, V_REC_COUNT." WA_MARA, GV_TXT, GV_AMT, GV_KBETR.
SELECT VBELN, KNUMV FROM VBRK INTO TABLE @DATA(ITVBRK)
SELECT KNUMV , KPOSN , KSCHL, KWERT FROM PRCD_ELEMENTS INTO TABLE @DATA(ITPRCD_ELEMENTS)
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @ITVBRK WHERE KNUMV = @ITVBRK-KNUMV.
FROM MARA INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF WA_MARA
SELECT SINGLE * FROM VBRP INTO WA_VBRP
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* READ TABLE lv_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 1.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = '0010' NAME = LV_NAME OBJECT = 'VBBP' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
DATA IT_SHIP TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TLINE.
SELECT SINGLE VBELV, POSNV, POSNN, VBELN
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = '0010' NAME = LV_SHIP OBJECT = 'VBBP' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
*clear : ls_line, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
*lo_text_reader->read_text_string( EXPORTING id = '0010' name = LV_NAME object = 'VBBP' IMPORTING lv_lines = lv_lines1 ).
*clear : wa_lines , LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
** CONCATENATE lv_text ls_line-tdline INTO lv_text SEPARATED BY space.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
*CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
**** CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
*** IF LV_LATRS CA 'A' OR LV_LATRS CA '1' OR LV_LATRS CA '2' OR LV_LATRS CA '3' OR LV_LATRS CA '4' OR LV_LATRS CA '5'
*** OR LV_LATRS CA '6' OR LV_LATRS CA '7' OR LV_LATRS CA '8' OR LV_LATRS CA '9' OR LV_LATRS CA '0' OR LV_LATRS CA 'B'
*** OR LV_LATRS CA 'B' OR LV_LATRS CA 'C' OR LV_LATRS CA 'D' OR LV_LATRS CA 'E' OR LV_LATRS CA 'F' OR LV_LATRS CA 'G'
*** OR LV_LATRS CA 'H' OR LV_LATRS CA 'I' OR LV_LATRS CA 'J' OR LV_LATRS CA 'K' OR LV_LATRS CA 'L' OR LV_LATRS CA 'M'
*** OR LV_LATRS CA 'N' OR LV_LATRS CA 'O' OR LV_LATRS CA 'P' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Q' OR LV_LATRS CA 'R' OR LV_LATRS CA 'S'
*** OR LV_LATRS CA 'T' OR LV_LATRS CA 'U' OR LV_LATRS CA 'V' OR LV_LATRS CA 'W' OR LV_LATRS CA 'X' OR LV_LATRS CA 'Y'
*** OR LV_LATRS CA 'Z' OR LV_LATRS CA '(' OR LV_LATRS CA ')' OR LV_LATRS CA '{' OR LV_LATRS CA '}' OR LV_LATRS CA '_'
*** OR LV_LATRS CA '.' OR LV_LATRS CA ',' OR LV_LATRS CA '-' OR LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE
*** OR LV_LATRS CA '&' OR LV_LATRS CA '>' OR LV_LATRS CA '<' .
*** CONCATENATE LV_LINES LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINES SEPARATED BY ' '.
*** REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<)>' IN LV_LINES WITH SPACE.
*** REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '<(>' IN LV_LINES WITH SPACE.
* LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = '0001' NAME = GV_SOPOTX OBJECT = 'VBBP' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'ZZ99' NAME = GV_SOPOTX OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
GV_KBETR, WA_BX, WA_SZ, GV_LFIMG, G_TERM, G_BSTKD.
READ TABLE IS_BIL_INVOICE-IT_REFPURORD INTO WA_REFPURORD WITH KEY ITM_NUMBER = GS_IT_GEN-ITM_NUMBER.
* FROM LIPS INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF wa_LIPS
** SELECT SINGLE VTEXT FROM TVZBT INTO
FROM MARA INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF WA_MARA
MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE I_KONV INTO W_KONV INDEX SY-INDEX.
* REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF ',' IN V_KWERT
* REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '.' IN V_KWERT
* REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '/' IN V_KWERT
INTO WA_PRICE WITH KEY ITM_NUMBER = GS_IT_GEN-ITM_NUMBER.
* GV_AMT = W_KONV-KWERT. "commented by mahadev sandip on 04/12/2025
GV_KBETR2 = W_KONV-KBETR * W_KBETR / 100 . "Added by mahadev sandip on 04/12/2025
*MODIFY gt_total from gs_total INDEX 1 TRANSPORTING kwert .
*MODIFY gt_total from gs_total INDEX 1 TRANSPORTING kwert .
* GS_IT_GEN-NETWR2 = GV_AMT. "commented by mahadev sandip on 04/12/2025
*clear : LS_line, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
*CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT1 LS_line-tdline INTO LV_TEXT1 SEPARATED BY space.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'GRUN' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'MATERIAL' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
* GV_AMT = GV_KBETR * GS_IT_GEN-FKIMG. "Added by mahadev sandip on 04/12/2025 cmd by ps 05_03_2026
* GS_IT_GEN-NETWR2 = GV_AMT. cmd by ps on 05_03_2026
READ TABLE ITVBRK INTO DATA(WVBRK) WITH KEY
READ TABLE ITPRCD_ELEMENTS INTO DATA(WPRCD_ELEMENTS) WITH KEY
READ TABLE ITPRCD_ELEMENTS INTO DATA(WPRCD_ELEMENTS_N) WITH KEY
LV_TOT = LV_TOT + GS_IT_GEN-NETWR2 . "Added by mahadev sandip on 04/12/2025
* READ TABLE itvbrp INTO DATA(wvbrp) WITH key vbeln = GS_IT_GEN-bil_number " added by ps on 02.03.2026
* posnr = gs_it_gen-itm_number. " added by ps on 02.03.2026
* GS_IT_GEN-NETWR2 = wvbrp-netwr. " added by ps on 02.03.2026
* LV_TOT = LV_TOT + GS_IT_GEN-NETWR2. " added by ps on 02.03.2026
*MODIFY GT_IT_GEN FROM GS_IT_GEN TRANSPORTING LV_NAME1 . "DPVAL CCVAL.
GW_TAX-DIS = 'Sub Total' . "added by mahadev sandip on 04/12/2025
GW_TAX-AMNT = LV_TOT + FR_VAL + ZIN1_VAL + ZFR2_VAL + ZPFO_VAL + ZEXP +
ZOC1 + ZTE1 + ZTC1 + ZLST + ZCST + ZIN2 + ZOC2 + ZTE2 + ZTC2 + JWTS + ZFCM +
ZFM2 + ZACC + ZCEH + ZCEP + ZCOM + ZECT + ZESC + ZEXT + ZFRP + ZIPP + ZLIP +
GW_TAX-DIS = 'Grand Total' . "Added by mahadev sandip on 04/12/2025
GW_TAX-AMNT = LV_TOT + FR_VAL + ZIN1_VAL + ZFR2_VAL + ZPFO_VAL + ZEXP +
ZOC1 + ZTE1 + ZTC1 + ZLST + ZCST + ZIN2 + ZOC2 + ZTE2 + ZTC2 + JWTS + ZFCM +
ZFM2 + ZACC + ZCEH + ZCEP + ZCOM + ZECT + ZESC + ZEXT + ZFRP + ZIPP + ZLIP +
DATA : LS_HD_FIN TYPE LINE OF LB_T_BIL_HD_FIN .
READ TABLE IS_BIL_INVOICE-HD_FIN INTO LS_HD_FIN INDEX 1.
DATA: GROSZE TYPE P DECIMALS 2 VALUE 0.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'CENTS ONLY' INTO GV_AMTWORDS SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LS_WORD-DECWORD 'HALALAS' INTO GV_AMTWORDS SEPARATED BY SPACE.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF ',' IN V_KWERT WITH ''.
*DATA : GV_TXT_NEW TYPE SPELL. "commeted by mahadev on 12/1/2025
DATA : TAX_AMT1 TYPE PC207-BETRG, " added by mahadev on 21/1
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
**REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'Paise' IN GV_TXT1 WITH ' '.
**REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF 'Rupees' IN GV_TXT1 WITH ' and '.
*clear : ls_line , LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_EXPORT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_EXPORT SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z034' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
*clear : ls_line , LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
* CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
*REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF ' <(>&<)>' IN LV_REMARK WITH SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'Z041' NAME = LV_TEXTNAME OBJECT = 'VBBK' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
CLEAR : LS_LINE,LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
*CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'ST' NAME = 'REGD_OFFICE3' OBJECT = 'TEXT' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
CLEAR : LS_LINE ,LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
*CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'ST' NAME = 'REGD_OFFICE' OBJECT = 'TEXT' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
CLEAR : LS_LINE, LV_LINE, LV_LATRS, LV_SPACE, LV_LENGTH, LV_SAFE_LEN, LV_LATRS1.
*CONCATENATE LV_SPACE1 LV_SPACE2 INTO LV_SPACE SEPARATED BY CL_ABAP_CHAR_UTILITIES=>NEWLINE.
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* CONCATENATE LV_TEXT LS_LINE-TDLINE INTO LV_TEXT SEPARATED BY SPACE.
LO_TEXT_READER->READ_TEXT_STRING( EXPORTING ID = 'ST' NAME = 'REGD_OFFICE2' OBJECT = 'TEXT' IMPORTING LV_LINES = LV_LINES1 ).
LV_TITLE3A = 'Industrial Valve (Excl. Pressure-Reducing Valves And thermostatically controlled Valves),'.
LV_TITLE4A = 'OTHERS - PARTS OF VALVES - ACTUATOR & ACCESSORIES'.

FORMS.FPCLINE: * Valid numbers for IF_TABLE: 1 text from sales organisation
* default: read text from sales org
